message:
feat(rch-common): add test command classification and structural checks

Enhances command classification with:
- is_test_command() method on CompilationKind for cache affinity decisions
- Test binaries (target/debug/deps/) benefit more from warm caches
- Input redirection detection (< operator) for safety
- Subshell/process substitution detection (<(cmd), >(cmd), (cmd))
- Additional tests for new structural checks

These improvements prevent unsafe command interception when shell constructs
could lead to unexpected behavior during remote compilation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
